data.description:
## Context / Problem
Ruff ASYNC is currently clean in production. Ruff DTZ has exactly three findings: timezone-naive parsing in src/rebar/_engine_support/validate_checks.py and date.today usage in src/rebar/grounding/detectors/security_pin.py. The approved ratchet should land only after those semantics are made explicit.

## Approach
Add ASYNC and DTZ to the gated Ruff selection, fix the three DTZ sites using explicit timezone-aware or local-date semantics, and add focused regression tests before changing implementation. Rejected: blanket DTZ ignores, because the current findings are small and directly remediable.

## Scope
- pyproject.toml
- src/rebar/_engine_support/validate_checks.py
- src/rebar/grounding/detectors/security_pin.py
- focused existing or new unit tests for validation timestamps and security-rule cadence
- tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py if a configuration contract test is needed

## Testing
- Red: tests pin expected UTC/local-date behavior and the configured Ruff families.
- Green: focused tests pass after the three fixes.
- Gate: Ruff check and format-check pass across src and tests.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Ruff ASYNC and DTZ are blocking through the canonical Ruff selection; verified by a config contract test and make lint.
- [ ] All three existing DTZ findings are fixed without blanket per-file ignores; verified by ruff check --select ASYNC,DTZ src/rebar.
- [ ] Timestamp validation and security-rule age calculations retain their intended boundary behavior; verified by focused unit tests.
- [ ] No Ruff security S rules or Semgrep changes are included; verified by the diff.
data.title: Enable Ruff ASYNC and DTZ checks
